Trust and safety

Built for secure fresh-market shopping.

The Harvest Place Ja combines product clarity, protected accounts, secure checkout, support records, and farmer verification into one trustworthy marketplace experience.

Trust focus

Fresh, secure, traceable

Customers can shop with more confidence when products, orders, support, and protected access work together.

Fresh market confidence

Customers can browse products, review farm details, build a box, and track order status.

Protected operations

Admin, farmer, product, order, and payout workflows should stay protected by approved roles.

Clear support path

Support tickets, order records, photos, and admin replies help resolve issues fairly.

Trust

Trust Center

Clear products, secure checkout, order tracking, support, farmer verification, and protected admin operations are built into the market.

Trusted workflow

Freshness and origin records

Traceability records can help customers understand where products come from, how they were handled, and when they were harvested.

Trusted workflow

Protected Supabase Auth sessions

Customer, farmer, and admin access should be protected through Supabase Auth sessions and secure account workflows.

Trusted workflow

RLS-backed customer, admin, and farmer data

Sensitive marketplace data should remain protected behind Row Level Security policies and database-side permission rules.

Trusted workflow

Order confirmation and support records

Order details, support tickets, admin replies, and customer messages help create a reliable post-purchase experience.

Trusted workflow

Verified farmer approval workflow

Farmer profiles and product approvals help protect marketplace quality before products appear for shoppers.

Trusted workflow

Secure checkout RPC stock validation

Stock should be checked securely before checkout completes so customers receive accurate order confirmations.

Trusted workflow

How the marketplace builds confidence

1Customer shops fresh products
2Cart is reviewed before checkout
3Stock is checked securely
4Order status is tracked
5Support records stay available
Security reminder

Trust depends on strong database rules.

Frontend checks make the app easier to use, but sensitive actions should still be protected by Supabase Auth, Row Level Security, RPC validation, and role-based access.

Protect customer account data.
Restrict farmer and admin tools to approved users.
Validate stock and orders before checkout is completed.
Shop fresh picksContact support

Launch note

This page explains the trust features in the web app. Before public launch, confirm that Supabase RLS policies, admin permissions, farmer approval rules, storage access, and checkout RPC validation are fully tested.
